{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321122252CDCCB91E14F70C2D5AA9"}"},"total":81},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7610050701220053784","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好，很有骑士精神，太棒了！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1771856446,"group_id":"7603944623953677337","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N7jQIQcKLvn5WJJc7wagp3R6+H5SUx3sBE9Xv3+Nk1p1","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p9-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/97c5672bb60e43b79e3301d1af6ba10d~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776620796&x-signature=dhqwM%2FDny%2FRbNVYJ5QBjyN799dA%3D","user_id":"1913614625674259","user_name":"愿此刻永恒."},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1913614625674259","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7603944623953677337","book_info":{"abstract":"因一场意外，失去了大多记忆的泷偶然发现了隐藏在和平城市阴暗面里，在梦境中企图入侵现实的“梦魇”！
为了搞清楚梦魇出现的真相，也为了找回自己的记忆，能够通过清醒梦在梦境世界中活动的泷也不得不硬着头皮拿起不知为何一直戴在身边的Zeztz驱动器不断战斗。而在梦境中，泷第一个拯救的人是因为病原侵蚀身体孱弱的女孩花寺和佳。脆弱的身体，让女孩在睡梦中比起其他人来更容易遭到梦魇的纠缠和骚扰。搞不清楚的事太多了，但不管怎样，不能对眼前需要帮助的人置之不理！
“梦境的话，即便被看到样子也没关系的吧，骑士先生，反正一醒来什么我都会忘光光的。”
“那个病原坏蛋被彻底打败了，以后的梦境也不会再有骑士先生过来拯救我了吧，有点……寂寞呢……而且，马上要搬家了，呐，最后一次，也不能让我看看骑士先生的样子么？”
被拯救的女孩用蛊惑的语气这样说到。
于是泷老实的思考，老实的抬手，老实的解除变身。
对于泷来说，这不过是找回记忆的小插曲。
为了寻回记忆，即便暂时卧底黑暗也不是不行，于是他前往了健康市。
在那里，当被有些的眼熟粉色战士用数据超模的拳头打到解除变身。女孩脸上那崩坏的表情，让泷隐隐感到有些不妙……","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/0858336459dc8970afd7d85c01d217fb~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"鲁卡Luka","author_id":"","book_id":"7603944623953677337","book_name":"恶役骑士才不想被光之美少女喜欢","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#202018","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3.6万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":718,"name":"动漫衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=718&name=动漫衍生&genre_type=0&gender=2&source=detail"},{"category_id":92,"name":"腹黑","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=92&name=腹黑&genre_type=0&gender=2&source=detail"},{"category_id":91,"name":"多女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=91&name=多女主&genre_type=0&gender=2&source=detail"},{"category_id":465,"name":"综漫","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=465&name=综漫&genre_type=0&gender=2&source=detail"},{"category_id":846,"name":"黑化","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=846&name=黑化&genre_type=0&gender=2&source=detail"},{"category_id":505,"name":"破案","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=505&name=破案&genre_type=0&gender=2&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7603945090037334553","read_count":"35741","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"236273"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.1","serial_count":"41","tags":"动漫衍生,多女主,综漫,腹黑,黑化,破案","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/0858336459dc8970afd7d85c01d217fb~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779250972&x-signature=ymPy8LyeVcW60egD6zOUls5ULhg%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1086792616646654","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"51"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321122252CDCCB91E14F70C2D5AA9"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读4小时后
